title: Awon Irinse Iyanu Ti Ammachi
description: Itan Yi Ni Soki: Sooraj ati iya-nla re FERAN sise awari! Da ara po mon won ninu irinajo awari won ti won seese se: nipa lilo awon irin ise ti ko tobi ju lati se  barfi lati ara agbon.

pages.text:
Ammachi! Ammachi! Nje a lee se ohun jije lati ara agbon loni?" Sooraj bere lowo iya-nla re.
"E JOOOOOWOO?"

"Ah ah ah! Afi ti o baa le ranmilowo lati see,
abi?" Ammarachi daa lohun.
                                                               "EEE!"

"Se o ti yaa?" Sooraj pariwo.
"O ti yaa!" Ammachi daa lohun.

"See,  a kan ma saa awon ti o ti gbo daada nibe ni?
            Awon ti won ti pupa resuresu ni ara...
               Woo!  Won ti nja lule o!"
                  OOOOOOSHII... OOOOOOSHI!

"Oya, jeki a boo eepo ara won kuro..."
                     PUUUU! KRAAAAAAAAAA!

Inu ikun Sooraj bere si pariwo: GRRRRRRR!
                                                                Ammachi bere si fii se yeye.

"Oya jeki a fo awon paandi agbon wonyi...  BAYI!"
                                                                                              Paaauuu!
" Ki o si ma gun eeeesssooo inu re!"

"Oya daa si inu ikoko pelu gbogbo awon eroja ti o ku... "
   "Ammachi, oorun re dara!"
"Bayi, a o daa si inu atee kan... Fi ara bale titi ti yio fi tutu, baba!"

"Oya maa ge si keekeekee daradara... "
     
                                    Kaanhun
                                     Kaanhun

"EEEEEEEEE! Ohun jije wa, lati ara agbon, ti setan fun jije bayi!"
      WOMU WOMU WOMU!"

Ohun jije barfi ti Ammachi se, seese nipa lilo AWON IRIN ISE TI KO TOBI JU! Awon irin ise ti ko tobi ju ma nmu ki ise sise rorun pupo. A ni awon irin ise mefa bee:
  1. Irin ise lati mu ki nkan dan daradara tabi lati gbe ere lati ara igi.
   2. Irin ise ti o ni agbara lati maa gbe awon ohun ti o ba wuwo pupo.
   3. Irin ise ti a se bi keke ti o lee maa yi pelu okun irin lati lee maa yii pelu agbara.

4. irin ise ti a fii irin tabi igi se, ti o ni enu sooro kan ati enu miran ti o nipon gidi, ti a lee fi maa laa nkan simeji, lati lee fi aaye sile.
tabi ti a lee fi yaa awon nkan meji ti o lee papo mo ara won, si otooto.
   5. Agbaa tabi awon agbaa ti a lee fi okun so lai baa lee gbe awon ohun ti o wuwo si oke tabi si isale.
   6. Irin ise ti ko tobi ju ti o ni awon iho ti o npoyi ni ara re ati awon miran pelu iho ni aarin re lati lee ki boo inu ara won.
 Nje o le see ida mon awon irin ise wonyi ti Sooraj ati Ammachi lo  nisise ohun jije barfi lati ara agbon?
